title: Experience Ore
description: This vanilla-plus mod adds a new Experience Ore block to the world generation. When mined, the ore drops experience orbs directly, similar to mining coal or diamond, but with a focus purely on XP.
body:
![Expierence](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/540502f969e2a173509b90cac5f3df727736f01e_0.webp)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
This vanilla-plus mod adds a new Experience Ore block to the world generation. When mined, the ore drops experience orbs directly, similar to mining coal or diamond, but with a focus purely on XP. It can be found in the overworld. Perfect for players who want to boost their levels without relying on mob farming or smelting. The ore integrates smoothly into Minecraft's natural generation for a balanced and immersive experience.


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7852a370ba367fd456e00295f1413325fcb76f42.png)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### The ore drop a total Amount of 25 EXP Points
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f52456a7e1ee821807c35553c82bbb4223d5faa9_0.webp)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### The ores generate naturaly
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
